Anilao — Banate — Iloilo City · meet-ups & delivery

The keepsake — N.02

Life is like a flower — beautiful, precious, meant to be cherished.

A bouquet of handcrafted blooms is more than a gift — it is a celebration of beauty, thought, and love. Each stem is bent, wrapped and sculpted from soft fuzzy wire, custom-made to match a person and a moment.

It never wilts and never asks for water. It is not just a gift — it is a keepsake as unique as your love story.

Begin your bouquet ↗

The collection — N.03

Wander the garden.

Sixteen pieces · four families · no two alike — drift slowly

Single Stems Bouquets Keepsakes Custom Trinkets

The promise — N.04

It's not just a gift — it's a keepsake.

Make it · Own it · Love it · Crafting your special moments ·  Make it · Own it · Love it · Crafting your special moments · 

How to order — N.05

Every piece begins with a conversation.

  1. 01

    Start the conversation

    Send us a message on Facebook with your idea, occasion, or custom request — colours, initials, a favourite flower, any vibe you can describe.

  2. 02

    We sculpt it by hand

    Every petal and loop is bent with care and dedication to match your vision. Quality takes time — we kindly don't take rush orders.

  3. 03

    We meet you with it

    Expect our check-in message exactly one day before your date to finalise details. Meet-ups and delivery across Anilao, Banate and Iloilo City.

Friendly reminder — every order is confirmed the day before pick-up. No physical storefront; the whole atelier lives in our Facebook chat.

Ready to brighten your day? — N.06

Send us a message ↗

Custom orders open · handcrafted in Iloilo, Philippines
